zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Constance Kythin於從1512年1月11日到1513年1月10日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓時，她的父親Sir William Kythin23歲，母親Isabel Budden Majors21歲。她於1534年1月10日與John William Webster II在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年8月22日在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Constance Kythin于从1512年1月11日到1513年1月10日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓时，她的父亲Sir William Kythin23岁，母亲Isabel Budden Majors21岁。她于1534年1月10日与John William Webster II在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年8月22日在她的家乡，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Constance Kythin was born from 11 January 1512 to 10 January 1513, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir William Kythin, was 23 and her mother, Isabel Budden Majors, was 21. She married John William Webster II on 10 January 1534, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 22 August 1560, in her hometown, and was buried in Cossington, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Constance Kythin est née du 11 janvier 1512 au 10 janvier 1513, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Kythin, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Budden Majors, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John William Webster II le 10 janvier 1534, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1560, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Constance Kythin von 11. Januar 1512 bis 10. Januar 1513 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Kythin 23 und ihre Mutter Isabel Budden Majors 21. Sie hat am 10. Januar 1534 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England John William Webster II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. August 1560 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Cossington, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Constance Kythin è nata il da 11 gennaio 1512 a 10 gennaio 1513 nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Sir William Kythin, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Isabel Budden Majors, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John William Webster II il 10 gennaio 1534, nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1560, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Cossington, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Constance Kythinがから1512年1月11日まで1513年1月10日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで生まれた時，父Sir William Kythinは23歳，母Isabel Budden Majorsは21歳であった。1534年1月10日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンでJohn William Webster IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年8月22日に故郷で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Constance Kythin(이)가 1512년 1월 11일부터 1513년 1월 10일까지 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Kythin(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Budden Majors(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1534년 1월 10일 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 John William Webster II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 8월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Constance Kythin nasceu de 11 de janeiro de 1512 a 10 de janeiro de 1513, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Kythin, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Budden Majors, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John William Webster II em 10 de janeiro de 1534, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1560, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.1512–12 August 1560: с 11 января 1512 по 10 января 1513–22 августа 1560 г.
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Constance Kythin родилась с 11 января 1512 по 10 января 1513 в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Kythin было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Budden Majors, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John William Webster II 10 января 1534 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 22 августа 1560 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con John William Webster II el 10 de enero de 1534, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1560, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
